intro:
"Your choices reveal the truth."
Pick the evidence, expose the contradictions. A full-scale mystery investigation with Detective Reiji Takatori.
description:
"Master Detective Reiji Takatori: Mystery Investigation" is a deduction-style mystery game where you team up with a detective to chase down cases — selecting the most fitting item from four choices to close in on the truth.

Suspicious details at the crime scene, conflicting testimonies, hidden truths…
From the four options presented, you must choose the item best suited to resolving each situation.

One choice can change everything — use logic and instinct to cut to the heart of each case.

Each chapter stands alone as its own self-contained case, yet as you play on, a deeper and shadowy mystery begins to surface beneath them all.

"This is more than just solving cases."
The immersive pull of a serialized drama awaits you.

Perfect for mystery fans and anyone looking for a satisfying game to enjoy in their spare time.

Can you unravel every last mystery?

ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー
TT supports gaming content creators.
No permission from TT is required to stream or create gameplay content, whether for personal or commercial use.
